events.title: AI and Business Strategy Workshop
events.description: Explore how AI is transforming business strategy. Learn from industry experts about implementation challenges and opportunities.

events.description: Connect with fellow students and professionals in data science. Enjoy drinks and learn about career opportunities.

events.description: Team up and solve real business cases using digital strategies. Win prizes and showcase your skills.
